emails.subject: MOVE FROM 3AC
emails.body: MOVE FROM 3AC I have just received confirmation that December 29th is available for the "BIG MOVE." I need to get the room assignments, etc. so I can submit the request no later than tomorrow. Thanks. Joya' F. Williams Davis Sr. Admin. Assistant ENA Legal Department EB3855A joya.davis@enron.com (713) 853-9559 DID (713) 646-4842 FAX

emails.subject: Re: MOVE FROM 3AC
emails.body: Re: MOVE FROM 3AC As you know, Dan and I had worked up the locations for the EGM lawyers. You have a copy of that workseet. I think we just need to add the three paralegals Larry, Martha, and Sara into the three cubicle slots against the 38C1 Conference Room wall. Please go ahead and do this. I understood that Janette would indicate where the assistants would be located. If you need anything else, please advise. Thanks. Alan
